title: 45 Pcs Artificial Pine Branch Berry Pinecones Set - 33cm Fake Christmas Foliage Greenery Twigs Pine Cones Picks Berries Stems for Vase DIY Craft Xmas Wreath Garland Home Decor (45, Red Berries)
features: COMPLETE SET – Get 30pcs lifelike artificial pine branches (13”), 5pcs faux pinecone picks, and 10pcs red berry stems—perfect for wreaths, garlands, and festive DIY crafts. Includes Norfolk pine branches & faux cedar stems for a lush holiday look

PREMIUM MATERIALS – Crafted from high-quality PE material with bendable wire stems—fade-proof, unbreakable, and lightweight. Ideal for Christmas tree filler branches or Christmas foliage arrangements. No watering needed, stays vibrant year after year!

REALISTIC DESIGN – Ultra-lifelike Christmas tree picks with detailed pine needles, textured pinecones, and rich burgundy red berries. Perfect for creating a natural winter aesthetic without the mess of real greenery!

VERSATILE USAGE – Bendable stems for custom arrangements—use in wreaths, garlands, vase arrangements, table centrepieces, gift toppers, or party backdrops. Mix with fairy lights or ornaments for stunning mantel decor, centerpieces, and more!

EFFORTLESS HOLIDAY STYLING : Flexible stems bend easily for custom arrangements. Mix with fairy lights, ornaments, or vase fillers to create stunning centerpieces, mantel decor, or Christmas tree accents.
description: Transform your holiday décor with this comprehensive 45-piece artificial pine branch set. Each 33-centimetre branch features a stunning combination of realistic pine needles, pine cones, and rich burgundy berries, perfect for creating festive arrangements. The set includes carefully crafted plastic pine cones and berries that maintain their beauty throughout the season. Ideal for crafting beautiful Christmas wreaths, garlands, or adding a touch of winter charm to vase arrangements. These versatile stems can be bent and shaped to achieve your desired look, making them perfect for DIY holiday projects. Whether adorning your mantelpiece, creating table centrepieces, or designing a welcoming front door wreath, these artificial pine branches provide the perfect foundation for your seasonal decorations. The deep green needles and burgundy berries offer a classic holiday colour palette that complements any Christmas décor style.
